creator: hardware@FreeBSD.org
text:
The devcpu-data port is notfound, both for firmware and the devcpu program.
Linux/debian may have current sources for this.
They may also have alternative microcode update program.
Also search for "microdecode".
http://downloadmirror.intel.com/23829/eng/microcode-20140430.tgz
AMD also supplies microcode updates.
ftp.springdaemons.com is down.
